transforms: Cleaned the R2 bucket before the fresh logo batch.
Collected logo candidates from canonical official university website URLs.
Rejected weak, invisible, partner-logo, non-standalone, and non-raster candidates during review.
Generated WebP and AVIF variants under the universities CDN key namespace.
Uploaded verified variants to R2 and retained exact source URLs in data/assets.json.
reviewNotes: First fresh logo batch after R2 cleanup. Approved 37 official website logo assets; remaining universities need manual follow-up or have no usable official raster logo source in this pass.
